label: Transparent Puffball motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Puffball transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated puffball fungus motif for a design-system catalog. Show one complete white puffball fungus with a small attached tuft of meadow grass and a compact soil clump at the base so the motif carries white sphere, grass green, and soil colors. No landscape, no props beyond the attached natural base, no text.
Subject: A rounded white puffball fungus, almost spherical but naturally organic, matte velvety skin with faint pores and cream-gray dimples, a subtle tan shadowed underside, a few slender meadow-green grass blades, and a small dark olive-brown soil base. Accurate natural fungus form, crisp silhouette edges, tactile surface texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the sphere, grass blades, or base. Keep the subject fully separated from the background.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white, cream, grass green, olive moss, and soil-brown material detail. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no decorative background, no second mushroom, no cap-and-stem mushroom, no amanita, no gills, no spores cloud, no landscape scene.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Puffball" / "Puffball Fungus", derived from the visible transparent puffball motif reference. The board is a ready shadcn/tweakcn theme source asset.
Reference use: Extract the palette, surface texture, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible motif: white spherical pore texture, warm cream underside, meadow grass green, moss olive, compact soil brown, root taupe, and deep loam shadow. Use only these motif-derived colors and near-neutrals present in the motif.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, high-resolution 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clear hierarchy, no dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Puffball", motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command palette/search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, empty state, error state, loading state, focus ring and hover states.
Visual language: plain language product system, quiet meadow-field interface, soft puffball-white surfaces, stippled pore-grain texture, soil-brown structure, grass-green primary actions, moss-olive support states, cream highlights, 8px radii, compact 8px spacing grid, restrained shadows like lifted paper over soil. Use lucide-style simple line icons where icons appear.
Typography: English guidance with Geist-like clean sans; Japanese typography guidance with Noto Sans JP-like samples, short readable labels such as 日本語, 検索, 状態, 入力.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated colors, no saturated purple, no blue gradient, no neon, no generic stock UI kit, no random brand logos, no misspellings, no cap-and-stem mushroom, no second motif as main subject, no watermark.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Puffball" / "Puffball Fungus". It must feel like the same system translated from the visible light board and visible puffball motif, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent puffball motif and the light design-system board visible in the conversation as references. Preserve the same palette roles, plain-language component language, stippled pore texture, compact spacing, 8px radii, and shadcn/tweakcn UI coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, high-resolution 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, clear hierarchy, no dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Puffball Dark", palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command palette/search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, empty state, error state, loading state, focus ring and hover states.
Visual language: dark background from deep loam and soil umber, cards from dark soil and root taupe, foreground from puffball white and warm cream, primary actions in meadow grass green, secondary states in moss olive, focus rings and chart marks from grass, moss, cream, tan, and soil. Add subtle puffball pore-grain texture overlays. Use restrained contrast and compact product UI composition with 8px radii and 8px grid spacing.
Typography: English guidance with Geist-like clean sans; Japanese typography guidance with Noto Sans JP-like samples, short readable labels such as 日本語, 検索, 状態, 入力.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated colors, no saturated purple, no blue gradient, no neon, no pure flat black unless as tiny text contrast, no generic stock UI kit, no random brand logos, no misspellings, no cap-and-stem mushroom, no second motif as main subject, no watermark.
